name: Gundam RPG
description:
In this expansive RPG universe, every iconic Gundam and Mobile Suit from the vast Gundam multiverse finds its place. Within the sprawling cosmos, a multitude of diverse factions and civilizations have taken root, each staking their claim on distinct planets and regions, each with its own rich history, culture, and technological prowess.

As a valiant pilot embarking on this epic journey, you'll find yourself at the heart of a galaxy teeming with intrigue and adventure.
creator: BigDEEZ
